headlines.title: Republicans grapple with how much to have Trump on the campaign trail for the midterms
headlines.description: Trump’s approval rating is sinking amid high prices and the war with Iran, but he’s still the best at turning out the base voters Republicans need for the midterms.

headlines.title: Senators vote to withhold their own pay during government shutdowns
headlines.description: WASHINGTON — Senators unanimously approved a measure Thursday to withhold their own pay during federal government shutdowns

headlines.title: Trump presents a midterm dilemma for Republicans: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: In today’s edition, Jonathan Allen explores the delicate balance Republicans are attempting to strike for the midterms

headlines.title: Xi warns Trump of possible conflict over Taiwan at grand Beijing summit
headlines.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping warned of “clashes and even conflicts” with the U.S. over Taiwan, cautioning President Donald Trump that tensions over the Beijing-claimed island could jeopardize ties between the world’s two biggest economies.

headlines.title: South Carolina governor to call special session to redraw House maps
headlines.description: South Carolina Gov. Henry McMaster (R) is expected to announce a special session to address redistricting, just days after several Republican state senators crossed party lines to reject a plan that would have likely cost Rep. Jim Clyburn (D-S.C.) his seat. NBC News senior national political reporter Sahil Kapur reports for Meet the Press NOW.

headlines.title: Xi Jinping is ‘moving the goalposts’ on Taiwan, House China cmte. chair says
headlines.description: House Select Committee on China Chair Rep. John Moolenaar (R-Mich.) joins Meet the Press NOW to discuss President Trump’s trip to Beijing amid tensions between the two nations over Taiwan’s independence.

headlines.title: Marco Rubio says 'we're not asking for China's help' with Iran
headlines.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio tells NBC News' Tom Llamas that President Trump brought up Iran during the China summit and made the U.S. position clear. NBC News correspondents Gabe Gutierrez, Courtney Kube and Andrea Mitchell join Meet the Press NOW discuss Trump's bilateral meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping. Bonny Lin, director of the China Power Project at the Center for Strategic and International Studies, weighs in on the Taiwan issue hanging over the summit.

headlines.title: The war is on hold, but Iran’s internal crackdown is only deepening
headlines.description: While the Iranian regime has been battling its external enemies, Israel and the U.S., it has also been ramping up a deadly crackdown on those seen as the enemy within.

headlines.title: The cage match is on for tickets to Trump’s UFC fight at the White House
headlines.description: 4,000-plus spectators who are lucky enough, cunning enough or rich enough will score a seat to the UFC fight on the South Lawn next month.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Vance calls Sen. Susan Collins ‘a good fit for Maine’ despite his frustrations with her
headlines.description: Vice President JD Vance offered a vote of confidence Thursday for Sen. Sen. Susan Collins, a Republican who faces a tough re-election fight this year in Maine.
